motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def discountPrices(self, sentence: str, discount: int) -> str:
    words = sentence.split()
    result = ""
    for word in words:
        if word.startswith("$"):
            price = float(word[1:]) / (100 * discount)
            result += f"{price:.2f} {word}"
        else:
            result += word
    return result

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
